# AI Podcast · 双语播客全文阅读站

> 把知名 AI 人物(研究者、实验室建设者、创始人)的英文长访谈整理成中英对照全文，提炼核心观点与反共识，并可针对内容问答。A bilingual reading site of famous AI figures' podcast interviews — full English↔Chinese transcripts, key points, contrarian takes, and Q&A.

站点: https://aipodcast.jasonlin.tech/
规模: 104 位人物 / 285 期访谈
每期静态页含: 双语速览、核心观点、反共识、章节;互动版含中英对照全文 + 逐字朗读 + 单期/全站问答。

## 人物 People
- [Dario Amodei / 达里奥·阿莫迪](https://aipodcast.jasonlin.tech/pp/dario/): CEO, Anthropic — 14 期
- [Naval Ravikant / 纳瓦尔·拉维坎特](https://aipodcast.jasonlin.tech/pp/naval/): Co-founder, AngelList; angel investor & philosopher — 13 期
- [Demis Hassabis / 杰米斯·哈萨比斯](https://aipodcast.jasonlin.tech/pp/demis/): CEO, Google DeepMind — 11 期
- [Yoshua Bengio / 约书亚·本吉奥](https://aipodcast.jasonlin.tech/pp/bengio/): Professor, Mila — 10 期
- [Yann LeCun / 杨立昆](https://aipodcast.jasonlin.tech/pp/lecun/): Chief AI Scientist, Meta — 10 期
- [Sam Altman / 萨姆·奥尔特曼](https://aipodcast.jasonlin.tech/pp/altman/): CEO, OpenAI — 10 期
- [Greg Brockman / 格雷格·布罗克曼](https://aipodcast.jasonlin.tech/pp/brockman/): President & Co-founder, OpenAI — 9 期
- [Boris Cherny / 鲍里斯·切尔尼](https://aipodcast.jasonlin.tech/pp/boris/): Creator of Claude Code, Anthropic — 8 期
- [Elon Musk / 埃隆·马斯克](https://aipodcast.jasonlin.tech/pp/elon/): Founder, xAI — 8 期
- [Jensen Huang / 黄仁勋](https://aipodcast.jasonlin.tech/pp/jensen/): Founder & CEO, NVIDIA — 8 期

- [AI Surpasses Human Understanding in Math: OpenAI's Noam Brown on the Erdős Conjecture Disproof](https://aipodcast.jasonlin.tech/e/noambrown-baincapi-2026/) — Noam Brown, Bain Capital Ventures, 2026-06-04

- [Is Reasoning Enough for Generalization?](https://aipodcast.jasonlin.tech/e/kaiser-unsuperv-2026/) — Łukasz Kaiser, Unsupervised Learning, 2026-06-03
- [Nested Learning & AI Sleep: Towards Continual Learning with Ali Behrouz](https://aipodcast.jasonlin.tech/e/alibehrouz-thecogni-2026/) — Ali Behrouz, The Cognitive Revolution, 2026-06-03
- [Dennis Hassabis on AI, Creativity, and Human Flourishing at Stanford](https://aipodcast.jasonlin.tech/e/demis-stanford-2026/) — Demis Hassabis, Stanford Graduate School of Business, 2026-06-02
- [The Origin of Claude Code: From Accident to Agent](https://aipodcast.jasonlin.tech/e/boris-acquired-2026/) — Boris Cherny, Acquired Unplugged (presented by WorkOS), 2026-06-02

## 数据接口
- sitemap: https://aipodcast.jasonlin.tech/sitemap.xml
- MCP server (只读内容，外部 AI 可接入): https://aipodcast-mcp.992978142.workers.dev/mcp
